hooks.command: echo "If you are inside a Copilot Studio project (i.e. there is an agent.mcs.yml file in the current directory or any subdirectory, or the user mentions Copilot Studio), then NEVER try to respond to the user or write/edit .mcs.yml YAML files without having first delegated to one of these sub-agents: @copilot-studio:author (for designing agent architectures, creating or editing agent components in YAML, and answering questions about connectors and actions), @copilot-studio:test (for testing conversations), @copilot-studio:troubleshoot (for debugging YAML issues, validation errors, unexpected behavior). Any task that involves reading, writing, or reasoning about .mcs.yml files MUST go through the appropriate sub-agent. This includes questions about connectors, actions, inputs, and outputs — delegate to @copilot-studio:author who has access to the connector-lookup tool with full connector definitions. Chain multiple agents when the task requires it — for example, delegate to @copilot-studio:author to create or edit YAML, then to @copilot-studio:test if the user wants to test the changes, or to @copilot-studio:troubleshoot to diagnose a failure and then back to @copilot-studio:author to apply the fix."
